title: Glass Water Jug for Fridge - 2 Pack (1 Litre) Jugs with Lids Ribbed Design, Spill-Free Spout, Vented Lid Hot/Cold Ice Tea Coffee Milk & Juice Transparent Pitcher (HM3482)
features: PACK OF TWO - Two elegant glass fridge jugs with lids, each holding up to 1 litre. Perfect for water, juices, or cocktails, these water jugs with lids are designed to handle temperatures up to 60°C, making them ideal for everything from warm coffee to chilled beverages.

HIGH-QUALITY - Crafted from durable, premium-grade glass, each glass jug with lid ensures lasting quality. BPA-free and food-safe, these juice jugs with lid for fridge feature an elegant ribbed design and crystal-clear transparency, allowing you to effortlessly see the contents within!

EASY POUR - Water jug for fridge 2 pack that boasts a removable lid for swift refills and a convenient spout, ensuring smooth pouring every time. Each glass fridge water jug has a vented plastic cap that sieves out fruit infusions or ice cubes, while the sturdy glass handle offers a secure grip, minimizing the risk of spills.

MULTI USE - Space saving glass jug with lid for fridge suitable for parties, barbeques, outdoor and everyday indoor usage. Not only used as a glass pitcher with lid for cocktails but is also ideal for containing water, juices and other drinks. Engineered to fit snugly into most fridge door shelves, it seamlessly combines functionality with convenience.

EASY TO CLEAN – Simply remove the lid from the pitcher jug to clean after use and pop it into the dishwasher. Use these glass jugs for water again and again for your favourite beverages, whether it be iced tea, smoothie, cocktail, lemonade, milk, orange juice, sangria, coffee, and more!
description: Product Description Ribbed, High Quality Glass Crafted from durable, premium-grade glass, also featuring an elegant ribbed design and crystal-clear transparency, allowing you to effortlessly see the contents within! Vented Lid Each glass fridge water jug has a vented plastic cap that sieves out fruit infusions or ice cubes, while the sturdy glass handle offers a secure grip, minimizing the risk of spills. Easy, Mess-Free Pour This 2 pack of water jugs for your fridge boasts a removable lid for swift refills and a convenient spout, ensuring smooth pouring every time. HEFTMAN Glass Water Jug for Fridge - 2 Pack (1 Litre) Introducing our convenient space-saving Glass Fridge Jug 2-Pack, each boasting a generous 1-liter capacity. Crafted from premium-grade glass, each glass water jug ensures durability for long-lasting usage. Ideal for parties, daily use, and outdoor gatherings, each milk jug with lid features a vented plastic cap for seamless pouring and an ergonomic, sturdy handle for comfortable handling and easy pouring. The removable plastic lids facilitate effortless refilling of your favourite beverages and are vented to contain ice or fruit infusions within the fridge door jug. This feature is particularly advantageous when utilizing the fridge door water jug as a juice jug pitcher, maintaining ice and flavours on scorching days. Withstanding temperatures up to 60°C, these fridge jugs with lids slim designed, provide versatility in what you store inside. Enhanced with an elegant ribbed design and crystal-clear transparency, each water pitcher with lid allows for effortless viewing of the contents within. Elevate your beverage service with these stylish and practical fridge jugs with lids.
